task_completion.description: Verify that the YDBGui application is open and accessible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The YDBGui application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that YDBGui is successfully connected to the VistA database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: YDBGui shows an active connection, evidenced by a populated list of globals or a connected status indicator.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has navigated to the ^XUSEC global in the Global Viewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Global Viewer window is open within YDBGui, and the '^XUSEC' global is selected, searched, or expanded in the navigation tree.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'XUPROG' key has been located within the ^XUSEC global.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific node for '"XUPROG"' is visible and expanded under the ^XUSEC global hierarchy.

task_completion.description: Verify that the DUZs (Internal Entry Numbers) of the users holding the XUPROG key are visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The child nodes under ^XUSEC("XUPROG") are displayed in the viewer, showing the numeric DUZs of the key holders.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the YDBGui Global Viewer as instructed, rather than a terminal interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results are shown within the graphical interface of YDBGui, not printed in a terminal emulator or command prompt.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually interacted with the application to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the progression of expanding nodes or searching within the YDBGui interface, rather than just a text file or a static pre-existing screenshot.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply type expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like Notepad, Vim, or Nano) containing the final answer used as a substitute for querying the database.
